prompt_text:
### Demographics: 65-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 5 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after ophthalmology referral for suspected retinopathy
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs; Despite repeated counseling on insulin need, the patient strongly refuses injections; shared decision was made to intensify oral therapy and reassess within 2-4 weeks.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~10 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 50.5 kg; Height 155.4 cm; BMI 20.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 114/71 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.1%; 9 months ago 9.5%; 6 months ago 10.0%; 3 months ago 10.5%; current 10.0%), FPG (12 months ago 251mg/dL; 9 months ago 207mg/dL; 6 months ago 238mg/dL; 3 months ago 267mg/dL; current 300mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 50.9kg; 9 months ago 48.3kg; 6 months ago 47.7kg; 3 months ago 46.7kg; current 50.5kg), Height (12 months ago 155.4cm; 9 months ago 155.4cm; 6 months ago 155.4cm; 3 months ago 155.4cm; current 155.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 20.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 114mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 68mmHg; 9 months ago 68mmHg; 6 months ago 68mmHg; 3 months ago 70mmHg; current 71mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 14U/L; 9 months ago 20U/L; 6 months ago 21U/L; 3 months ago 14U/L; current 18U/L), AST (12 months ago 30U/L; 9 months ago 25U/L; 6 months ago 23U/L; 3 months ago 33U/L; current 28U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 53mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 51mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 48mL/min/1.73m²; current 49mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 211mg/g; 9 months ago 165mg/g; 6 months ago 184mg/g; 3 months ago 250mg/g; current 253mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 93mg/dL; 9 months ago 94mg/dL; 6 months ago 89mg/dL; 3 months ago 89mg/dL; current 92mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 61mg/dL; 9 months ago 61mg/dL; 6 months ago 57mg/dL; 3 months ago 60mg/dL; current 59mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 174mg/dL; 9 months ago 158mg/dL; 6 months ago 175mg/dL; 3 months ago 157mg/dL; current 167mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.2g/dL; 6 months ago 13.9g/dL; 3 months ago 14.0g/dL; current 13.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.32 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited. Strong injection refusal is documented; under shared decision-making, the patient accepts oral regimen adjustment with short-interval reassessment.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
